author: DJLougen
name: MPK 8x384
blurb: 10-minute capped MPK-style multi-path causal LM with 8 layers, width 384, GQA KV4, tied embeddings, and tuned lower learning rates on 80 FineWeb SP-1024 shards; pre-quant reached 1.0132 BPB at wallclock stop and final int8+zlib roundtrip scored 1.0156 under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
